articles.title: FULL TIME: Eels vs Panthers – Round 21, 2026
articles.description: The Parramatta Eels face the Penrith Panthers in Round 21 of the 2026 NRL season. Follow the live scores, team lists, match statistics and key moments from the game at CommBank Stadium.

articles.title: Melbourne Storm make bombshell Cameron Munster contract decision
articles.description: He is contracted through to the end of next year.

articles.title: Sea Eagles dummy half set to lock up future
articles.description: He is off-contract at the end of this year.
